_comments.user_id: References the document ID in the 'users' collection (Firebase Auth UID).
_comments.nearest_bin_id: References the document ID in the 'recycling_bins' collection (inc_crc).
_comments.image_path: Path in Firebase Storage, or null if image was not saved.
_comments.is_counted: true only when BOTH cv_result.is_recyclable AND location_check_passed are true.
_comments.points_awarded: Variable points awarded for successful recycling. Currently 50 per valid submission. 0 if not counted.
_comments.cv_result: Computer vision model output including detected items array and recyclability confidence.
